title: stewartia rubiginosa var. damingshanica
intro: Stewartia rubiginosa var. damingshanica is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Stewartia plant, which belongs to the Theaceae family and is commonly known as the Camellia tree due to its similar appearance. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate sore throats. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
